results.generated_sql:
WITH quarterly AS (
    SELECT 
        YEAR(order_date) AS year,
        QUARTER(order_date) AS quarter,
        SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value
    FROM orders
    WHERE pay_status IN ('paid', 'partial_refund')
    GROUP BY YEAR(order_date), QUARTER(order_date)
)
SELECT 
    CONCAT(year, '-Q', quarter) AS period,
    metric_value,
    LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY quarter ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value,
    ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY quarter ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY quarter ORDER BY year), 0), 4) AS growth_rate
FROM quarterly
ORDER BY year, quarter

WITH combined AS (
    SELECT substr(paid_at, 1, 7) AS month, SUM(amount) AS paid_amount, 0 AS refunded_amount
    FROM payments
    WHERE status = 'success'
    GROUP BY substr(paid_at, 1, 7)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT substr(refunded_at, 1, 7) AS month, 0 AS paid_amount, SUM(amount) AS refunded_amount
    FROM refunds
    WHERE status = 'success'
    GROUP BY substr(refunded_at, 1, 7)
)
SELECT 
    month,
    SUM(paid_amount) AS paid_amount,
    SUM(refunded_amount) AS refunded_amount,
    SUM(paid_amount) - SUM(refunded_amount) AS net_received
FROM combined
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC

results.generated_sql:
WITH CategoryStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.category_id,
        c.name AS category_name,
        SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales,
        SUM(s.cost * oi.quantity) AS total_cost
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    JOIN skus s ON oi.sku_id = s.sku_id
    JOIN spus sp ON s.spu_id = sp.spu_id
    JOIN categories c ON sp.category_id = c.category_id
    WHERE o.pay_status = 'paid'
    GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name
),
RankedCategories AS (
    SELECT 
        category_name,
        total_sales,
        total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS rn
    FROM CategoryStats
)
SELECT 
    category_name AS dimension_value,
    (total_sales - total_cost) / NULLIF(total_sales, 0) AS metric_value
FROM RankedCategories
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

用户问题:
统计已支付订单中销售额最高的10个商品品类毛利率；销售额用order_items.subtotal，成本用skus.cost乘以销量。

请输出 JSON: {"sql": "... or null", "chart_type": "...", "reasoning": "..."}
trace.generated_sql:
WITH CategoryStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.category_id,
        c.name AS category_name,
        SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales,
        SUM(s.cost * oi.quantity) AS total_cost
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    JOIN skus s ON oi.sku_id = s.sku_id
    JOIN spus sp ON s.spu_id = sp.spu_id
    JOIN categories c ON sp.category_id = c.category_id
    WHERE o.pay_status = 'paid'
    GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name
),
RankedCategories AS (
    SELECT 
        category_name,
        total_sales,
        total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS rn
    FROM CategoryStats
)
SELECT 
    category_name AS dimension_value,
    (total_sales - total_cost) / NULLIF(total_sales, 0) AS metric_value
FROM RankedCategories
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

results.generated_sql: SELECT receiver_province, COUNT(order_id) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales, SUM(total_amount) / COUNT(order_id) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE pay_status = 'paid' GROUP BY receiver_province HAVING COUNT(order_id) >= 50 ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC LIMIT 10

few_shot_examples.question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

results.generated_sql:
WITH OrderDiscounts AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NULL THEN '仅优惠券'
            WHEN coupon_id IS NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN '仅促销'
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN '券和促销同时使用'
            ELSE '无优惠'
        END AS discount_source,
        CASE 
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NULL THEN 1
            WHEN coupon_id IS NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN 2
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN 3
            ELSE 4
        END AS sort_order,
        order_id,
        product_amount,
        discount_amount
    FROM orders
    WHERE pay_status = 'paid'
)
SELECT 
    discount_source,
    COUNT(order_id) AS order_count,
    SUM(product_amount) AS product_amount,
    SUM(discount_amount) AS discount_amount,
    SUM(discount_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(product_amount), 0) AS discount_rate
FROM OrderDiscounts
GROUP BY discount_source, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

示例1 问题: 各商品品类的销售额占比

用户问题:
比较已支付订单的优惠来源组合：仅优惠券、仅促销、券和促销同时使用、无优惠；四类组合都输出，按预设顺序展示订单数、商品金额、优惠金额和优惠率。

请输出 JSON: {"sql": "... or null", "chart_type": "...", "reasoning": "..."}
trace.generated_sql:
WITH OrderDiscounts AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NULL THEN '仅优惠券'
            WHEN coupon_id IS NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN '仅促销'
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN '券和促销同时使用'
            ELSE '无优惠'
        END AS discount_source,
        CASE 
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NULL THEN 1
            WHEN coupon_id IS NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN 2
            WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL AND promotion_id IS NOT NULL THEN 3
            ELSE 4
        END AS sort_order,
        order_id,
        product_amount,
        discount_amount
    FROM orders
    WHERE pay_status = 'paid'
)
SELECT 
    discount_source,
    COUNT(order_id) AS order_count,
    SUM(product_amount) AS product_amount,
    SUM(discount_amount) AS discount_amount,
    SUM(discount_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(product_amount), 0) AS discount_rate
FROM OrderDiscounts
GROUP BY discount_source, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

results.generated_sql:
WITH first_paid_order AS (
  SELECT user_id, MIN(order_date) AS first_order_date
  FROM orders
  WHERE pay_status IN ('paid', 'partial_refund')
  GROUP BY user_id
),
eligible_users AS (
  SELECT user_id, register_date
  FROM users
  WHERE register_date >= '2023-01-01'
    AND register_date <= '2024-12-01'
)
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(u.register_date, '%Y-%m') AS register_month,
  COUNT(u.user_id) AS new_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN f.first_order_date BETWEEN u.register_date AND DATE_ADD(u.register_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS first_purchase_30d_users,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN f.first_order_date BETWEEN u.register_date AND DATE_ADD(u.register_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(u.user_id), 4) AS first_purchase_30d_rate
FROM eligible_users u
LEFT JOIN first_paid_order f ON u.user_id = f.user_id
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(u.register_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY register_month

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

参考示例:
示例1 问题: 不同会员等级的消费总额
示例1 SQL: SELECT membership_levels.name AS dimension_value, SUM(orders.total_amount) AS metric_value FROM membership_levels JOIN users ON users.level_id = membership_levels.level_id JOIN orders ON orders.user_id = users.user_id GROUP BY membership_levels.level_id, membership_levels.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC
示例2 问题: 销量排名前10的品牌
示例2 SQL: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC
示例3 问题: 销量最高的10个商品
示例3 SQL: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT skus.sku_name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id GROUP BY skus.sku_id, skus.sku_name) ranked WHERE rn <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

results.generated_sql:
WITH DefaultAddress AS (
    SELECT user_id, city AS default_city
    FROM user_addresses
    WHERE is_default = 1
),
LatestPaidOrder AS (
    SELECT user_id, receiver_city AS latest_paid_city
    FROM (
        SELECT user_id, receiver_city,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_date DESC) as rn
        FROM orders
        WHERE pay_status = 'paid'
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT
    ml.name AS dimension_value,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN da.default_city = lpo.latest_paid_city THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(u.user_id), 4) AS metric_value
FROM users u
JOIN membership_levels ml ON u.level_id = ml.level_id
JOIN DefaultAddress da ON u.user_id = da.user_id
JOIN LatestPaidOrder lpo ON u.user_id = lpo.user_id
GROUP BY ml.level_id, ml.name
ORDER BY metric_value DESC

用户问题:
按会员等级统计有默认地址且有已支付订单的用户，其默认地址城市与最近一笔已支付订单收货城市一致的比例。

请输出 JSON: {"sql": "... or null", "chart_type": "...", "reasoning": "..."}
trace.generated_sql:
WITH DefaultAddress AS (
    SELECT user_id, city AS default_city
    FROM user_addresses
    WHERE is_default = 1
),
LatestPaidOrder AS (
    SELECT user_id, receiver_city AS latest_paid_city
    FROM (
        SELECT user_id, receiver_city,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_date DESC) as rn
        FROM orders
        WHERE pay_status = 'paid'
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT
    ml.name AS dimension_value,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN da.default_city = lpo.latest_paid_city THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(u.user_id), 4) AS metric_value
FROM users u
JOIN membership_levels ml ON u.level_id = ml.level_id
JOIN DefaultAddress da ON u.user_id = da.user_id
JOIN LatestPaidOrder lpo ON u.user_id = lpo.user_id
GROUP BY ml.level_id, ml.name
ORDER BY metric_value DESC

WITH monthly_users AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m') AS current_month,
        user_id
    FROM user_events
    WHERE event_time >= '2024-01-01' AND event_time < '2025-01-01'
    GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m'), user_id
),
active_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        current_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users
    FROM monthly_users
    WHERE current_month <= '2024-11'
    GROUP BY current_month
),
retention_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        a.current_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) AS retained_users
    FROM monthly_users a
    JOIN monthly_users b 
        ON a.user_id = b.user_id 
        AND b.current_month = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(a.current_month, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m')
    WHERE a.current_month <= '2024-11'
    GROUP BY a.current_month
)
SELECT 
    a.current_month AS period,
    a.active_users,
    COALESCE(r.retained_users, 0) AS retained_users,
    ROUND(COALESCE(r.retained_users, 0) * 1.0 / a.active_users, 4) AS retention_rate
FROM active_counts a
LEFT JOIN retention_counts r ON a.current_month = r.current_month
ORDER BY a.current_month;

WITH color_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        sa.attr_value AS color,
        SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales
    FROM sku_attributes sa
    JOIN order_items oi ON sa.sku_id = oi.sku_id
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE sa.attr_name = '颜色'
      AND o.pay_status = 'paid'
    GROUP BY sa.attr_value
)
SELECT 
    color AS dimension_value,
    total_quantity AS quantity,
    total_sales AS sales_amount,

FROM color_sales
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

trace.generated_sql:
WITH color_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        sa.attr_value AS color,
        SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales
    FROM sku_attributes sa
    JOIN order_items oi ON sa.sku_id = oi.sku_id
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE sa.attr_name = '颜色'
      AND o.pay_status = 'paid'
    GROUP BY sa.attr_value
)
SELECT 
    color AS dimension_value,
    total_quantity AS quantity,
    total_sales AS sales_amount,
    ROUND(total_sales * 1.0 / SUM(total_sales) OVER(), 4) AS sales_ratio
FROM color_sales
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

results.generated_sql:
WITH sales AS (
  SELECT
    c.category_id,
    c.name AS category_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS sold_qty
  FROM categories c
  JOIN spus sp ON c.category_id = sp.category_id
  JOIN skus s ON sp.spu_id = s.spu_id
  JOIN order_items oi ON s.sku_id = oi.sku_id
  JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
  WHERE o.pay_status IN ('paid', 'partial_refund')
  GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name
  HAVING SUM(oi.quantity) >= 100
),
returns AS (
  SELECT
    c.category_id,
    SUM(ri.quantity) AS returned_qty
  FROM return_orders ro
  JOIN orders o ON ro.order_id = o.order_id
  JOIN return_items ri ON ro.return_id = ri.return_id
  JOIN skus s ON ri.sku_id = s.sku_id
  JOIN spus sp ON s.spu_id = sp.spu_id
  JOIN categories c ON sp.category_id = c.category_id
  WHERE ro.status IN ('completed', 'refunded')
    AND o.pay_status IN ('paid', 'partial_refund')
  GROUP BY c.category_id
)
SELECT
  sales.category_id,
  sales.category_name,
  sales.sold_qty,
  COALESCE(returns.returned_qty, 0) AS returned_qty,
  ROUND(COALESCE(returns.returned_qty, 0) * 1.0 / NULLIF(sales.sold_qty, 0), 4) AS return_rate
FROM sales
LEFT JOIN returns ON sales.category_id = returns.category_id
ORDER BY return_rate DESC, sales.sold_qty DESC, sales.category_id
LIMIT 10

  FROM return_orders ro
  JOIN orders o ON ro.order_id = o.order_id
  JOIN return_items ri ON ro.return_id = ri.return_id
  JOIN skus s ON ri.sku_id = s.sku_id
  JOIN spus sp ON s.spu_id = sp.spu_id
  JOIN categories c ON sp.category_id = c.category_id
  WHERE ro.status IN ('completed', 'refunded')
    AND o.pay_status IN ('paid', 'partial_refund')
  GROUP BY c.category_id
)
SELECT
  sales.category_id,
  sales.category_name,
  sales.sold_qty,
  COALESCE(returns.returned_qty, 0) AS returned_qty,
  ROUND(COALESCE(returns.returned_qty, 0) * 1.0 / NULLIF(sales.sold_qty, 0), 4) AS return_rate
FROM sales
LEFT JOIN returns ON sales.category_id = returns.category_id
ORDER BY return_rate DESC, sales.sold_qty DESC, sales.category_id
LIMIT 10

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

示例2 问题: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
示例2 SQL: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

以库存流水最大created_at为基准，严格统计最近30天时间窗口内各仓库的出库总量，按出库量降序。

请输出 JSON: {"sql": "... or null", "chart_type": "...", "reasoning": "..."}
trace.generated_sql: SELECT warehouses.name AS dimension_value, SUM(inventory_movements.quantity) AS metric_value FROM inventory_movements JOIN warehouses ON inventory_movements.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id WHERE inventory_movements.movement_type = 'outbound' AND inventory_movements.created_at >= DATE_SUB((SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM inventory_movements), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY warehouses.warehouse_id, warehouses.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

results.generated_sql:
WITH MaxTime AS (
    SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_created_at
    FROM inventory_movements
),
NetInflow AS (
    SELECT
        im.sku_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN im.movement_type = 'inbound' THEN im.quantity ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN im.movement_type = 'outbound' THEN im.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS net_inflow
    FROM inventory_movements im
    CROSS JOIN MaxTime mt
    WHERE mt.max_created_at IS NOT NULL
      AND im.created_at >= DATE_SUB(mt.max_created_at, INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY im.sku_id
)
SELECT
    s.sku_name AS dimension_value,
    n.net_inflow AS metric_value
FROM NetInflow n
JOIN skus s ON n.sku_id = s.sku_id
ORDER BY n.net_inflow DESC
LIMIT 10

参考示例:
示例1 问题: 库存低于安全库存需要补货的商品
示例1 SQL: SELECT skus.sku_name, warehouses.name AS warehouse, inventory.quantity, inventory.safety_stock FROM inventory JOIN skus ON inventory.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN warehouses ON inventory.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id WHERE inventory.quantity < inventory.safety_stock ORDER BY inventory.quantity
示例2 问题: 销量最高的10个商品
示例2 SQL: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT skus.sku_name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id GROUP BY skus.sku_id, skus.sku_name) ranked WHERE rn <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC
示例3 问题: 各仓库的出库总量
示例3 SQL: SELECT warehouses.name AS dimension_value, SUM(CASE WHEN inventory_movements.movement_type = 'outbound' THEN inventory_movements.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS metric_value FROM inventory_movements JOIN warehouses ON inventory_movements.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id GROUP BY warehouses.warehouse_id, warehouses.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.coupon_id,
  c.name AS coupon_name,
  c.threshold,
  c.value,
  COUNT(uc.user_coupon_id) AS received_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_count,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN o.total_amount END), 2) AS avg_used_order_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN o.discount_amount END), 2) AS avg_used_order_discount
FROM coupons c
LEFT JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON uc.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE c.type = 'full_reduction'
GROUP BY c.coupon_id, c.name, c.threshold, c.value
ORDER BY used_count DESC, received_count DESC, c.coupon_id
LIMIT 10

WITH promo_windows AS (
  SELECT
    promotion_id,
    name,
    start_date,
    end_date,
    DATEDIFF(end_date, start_date) + 1 AS window_days
  FROM promotions
),
sales AS (
  SELECT
    pw.promotion_id,
    pw.name,
    pw.window_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_date BETWEEN pw.start_date AND pw.end_date THEN oi.subtotal ELSE 0 END) AS promo_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(pw.start_date, INTERVAL pw.window_days DAY) AND o.order_date < pw.start_date THEN oi.subtotal ELSE 0 END) AS pre_revenue
  FROM promo_windows pw
  JOIN promotion_products pp ON pw.promotion_id = pp.promotion_id
  JOIN order_items oi ON pp.sku_id = oi.sku_id
  JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
  WHERE o.pay_status IN ('paid', 'partial_refund')
    AND o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(pw.start_date, INTERVAL pw.window_days DAY)
    AND o.order_date <= pw.end_date
  GROUP BY pw.promotion_id, pw.name, pw.window_days
)
SELECT
  promotion_id,
  name AS promotion_name,
  window_days,
  ROUND(promo_revenue, 2) AS promo_revenue,
  ROUND(pre_revenue, 2) AS pre_revenue,
  ROUND((promo_revenue - pre_revenue) / NULLIF(pre_revenue, 0), 4) AS lift_rate
FROM sales
ORDER BY promo_revenue DESC, promotion_id
LIMIT 10

参考示例:
示例1 问题: 各省份的销售额分布
示例1 SQL: SELECT receiver_province AS dimension_value, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders WHERE receiver_province IS NOT NULL GROUP BY receiver_province ORDER BY metric_value DESC
示例2 问题: 各物流公司的平均配送时长（天）
示例2 SQL: SELECT logistics_companies.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(AVG(julianday(shipments.delivered_at) - julianday(shipments.shipped_at)), 2) AS metric_value FROM shipments JOIN logistics_companies ON shipments.company_id = logistics_companies.company_id WHERE shipments.shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY logistics_companies.company_id, logistics_companies.name ORDER BY metric_value
示例3 问题: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
示例3 SQL: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

示例1 问题: 浏览、加购、下单各环节的用户数转化漏斗

示例2 问题: 商品好评率（评分4分及以上占比）
示例2 SQL: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews
示例3 问题: 各商品品类的销售额占比
示例3 SQL: SELECT categories.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.subtotal) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN categories ON spus.category_id = categories.category_id GROUP BY categories.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

few_shot_examples.question: 浏览、加购、下单各环节的用户数转化漏斗
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'view') AS view_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'add_cart') AS add_cart_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders) AS order_users

few_shot_examples.question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

results.generated_sql:
WITH user_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        source,
        user_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(event_time)) AS active_days,
        COUNT(*) AS event_count
    FROM user_events
    WHERE event_time >= '2024-01-01' AND event_time < '2025-01-01'
    GROUP BY source, user_id
)
SELECT 
    source AS dimension_value,
    COUNT(user_id) AS active_users,
    ROUND(AVG(active_days), 2) AS avg_active_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN active_days >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS users_3plus_days,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN active_days >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(user_id), 4) AS ratio_3plus_days,
    ROUND(AVG(event_count), 2) AS avg_events
FROM user_stats
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY active_users DESC;

results.generated_sql:
WITH order_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.order_id,
        o.product_amount,
        SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_subtotal
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    GROUP BY o.order_id, o.product_amount
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(order_id) AS inconsistent_order_count,
    MAX(ABS(product_amount - total_subtotal)) AS max_abs_difference,
    SUM(ABS(product_amount - total_subtotal)) AS total_abs_difference
FROM order_summary
WHERE product_amount <> total_subtotal

用户问题:
检查订单商品金额与订单明细小计之和是否一致，输出不一致订单数、最大绝对差异和总绝对差异。

请输出 JSON: {"sql": "... or null", "chart_type": "...", "reasoning": "..."}
trace.generated_sql:
WITH order_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.order_id,
        o.product_amount,
        SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_subtotal
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    GROUP BY o.order_id, o.product_amount
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(order_id) AS inconsistent_order_count,
    MAX(ABS(product_amount - total_subtotal)) AS max_abs_difference,
    SUM(ABS(product_amount - total_subtotal)) AS total_abs_difference
FROM order_summary
WHERE product_amount <> total_subtotal

results.generated_sql:
WITH order_payment_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.order_id,
        o.pay_status,
        o.total_amount,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 'success' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_pay_amount,
        MAX(CASE WHEN p.status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_success_pay
    FROM orders o
    LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
    GROUP BY o.order_id, o.pay_status, o.total_amount
)
SELECT 
    pay_status AS dimension_value,
    COUNT(order_id) AS order_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN has_success_pay = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_success_pay_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN success_pay_amount != total_amount THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS amount_mismatch_count
FROM order_payment_stats
GROUP BY pay_status
ORDER BY pay_status

参考示例:
示例1 问题: 商品评价的评分分布
示例1 SQL: SELECT rating AS dimension_value, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating
示例2 问题: 商品好评率（评分4分及以上占比）
示例2 SQL: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews
示例3 问题: 销量最高的10个商品
示例3 SQL: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT skus.sku_name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id GROUP BY skus.sku_id, skus.sku_name) ranked WHERE rn <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

请输出 JSON: {"sql": "... or null", "chart_type": "...", "reasoning": "..."}
trace.generated_sql: SELECT orders.status AS dimension_value, COUNT(product_reviews.review_id) AS metric_value, SUM(CASE WHEN orders.status != 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS non_completed_review_count FROM product_reviews JOIN order_items ON product_reviews.order_item_id = order_items.order_item_id JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id GROUP BY orders.status

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS used_coupon_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_order_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_id IS NOT NULL AND (o.coupon_id IS NULL OR o.coupon_id <> uc.coupon_id) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS coupon_mismatch_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_id IS NOT NULL AND date(uc.used_at) < o.order_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_before_order_date_count
FROM user_coupons uc
LEFT JOIN orders o ON uc.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE uc.status = 'used'

trace.query: 检查已使用用户券的订单关联一致性：统计缺失订单、orders.coupon_id为空或与用户券coupon_id不一致、used_at早于订单日期的数量。
trace.rewritten_query: 检查已使用用户券的订单关联一致性：统计缺失订单、orders.coupon_id为空或与用户券coupon_id不一致、used_at早于订单日期的数量。

few_shot_examples.question: 用户复购率（下单2次及以上的用户占比）
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) AS repeat_users) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders), 4) AS metric_value

few_shot_examples.question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
few_shot_examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

few_shot_examples.question: 浏览、加购、下单各环节的用户数转化漏斗
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'view') AS view_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'add_cart') AS add_cart_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders) AS order_users
